description: You are assisting a retro speedrunner in preparing their world record run for leaderboard submission using the raw hardware capture at /home/ga/Videos/raw_capture/speedrun_raw.mpg and the rules in /home/ga/Documents/leaderboard_rules.txt. Process the interlaced 720x480 MPEG-2 file to remove the 16-pixel overscan borders from all sides, resulting in a 688x448 deinterlaced video saved as /home/ga/Videos/leaderboard_submission/clean_run.mp4 using H.264 and AAC codecs. Extract the audio track as a standalone file named /home/ga/Videos/leaderboard_submission/run_audio.mp3. Capture a 688x448 PNG still frame from the processed video at the 0:25 mark and save it to /home/ga/Videos/leaderboard_submission/victory_thumbnail.png. Create a manifest at /home/ga/Videos/leaderboard_submission/manifest.json containing the keys: 'runner' (set to 'ga_agent'), 'original_resolution' ('720x480'), 'cropped_resolution' ('688x448'), and 'deinterlaced' (true).
